pandoc 
  to: html
  output-file: pi.html
  standalone: true
  title-prefix: Sedimentology Lab
  section-divs: true
  html-math-method: mathjax
  wrap: none
  default-image-extension: png
  css:
    - styles.css
  toc: true
  variables: {}
  
metadata
  document-css: false
  link-citations: true
  date-format: long
  lang: en
  theme: cosmo
  title: Prof. Choh, Suk-Joo
  about:
    template: solana
    image: chosukjoo.png
    image-shape: round
    links:
      - icon: envelope
        text: Email
        href: mailto:sjchoh@korea.ac.kr
      - icon: google
        text: Google Scholar
        href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=ko&user=jqboLEoAAAAJ
      - icon: file-text
        text: School website
        href: https://faculty.korea.ac.kr/kufaculty/sedrock/index.do
